{{Infobox concept
| name = Orichalcum
| introduced = The Engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Orichalcum]] is a mythical sun-[[steel]] etched with ancient spells.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c45">''The Engineer'', chapter 45</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Starhammer]] wears bands of reddish-gold orichalcum around his wrists and ankles etched with [[Aetheric symbols]].<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c46">''The Engineer'', chapter 46</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Orichalcum]] is a gold-like magical mineral.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c8">''The Pilot'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
